message:
fix: add error handling to clipboard operations

Wrap navigator.clipboard.writeText() calls in try/catch to handle
cases where clipboard access is denied (e.g., some browser contexts
or permission restrictions). Prevents unhandled promise rejections.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
